description: Canonical fixture for the AH-PRD-05 supervisor-orchestration trace contract. Models §2.2 of AH-PRD-05-trace-contract-diff.md: one sequential task_delegation (task-mode call-and-return), a fanout span with two parallel task_delegation children (ctx.run_node + asyncio.gather), and a synthesis task_delegation that depends on both fan-out result keys. Every supervisor-specific span carries emission_status='deferred' + a deferred_reason referencing AH-PRD-05 (the runtime does not yet emit any of this — it is the target shape gated on AH-PRD-13 + AH-PRD-05). The root ken_e span is emission_status='emitted' since that behavior is unchanged. node_path values in each task_delegation's summary are sourced verbatim from the AH-99 probe-1 / probe-4 evidence (docs/spike-adk2-supervisor-orchestration-live.md §4). AH-121 re-plan carry-forward (2026-06-07): isolated AgentTool leaves (google_search, numerical_analyst) inside a specialist stay AgentTool-isolated; their inner spans are absent from this fixture by design (the AgentTool off-state sink mechanism is the AH-PRD-15-owned concern — see docs/design/components/agentic-harness/projects/AH-PRD-05-trace-contract-diff.md §3.3). MER-E extractors MUST treat the absence of inner grounded-search / code-exec spans as an accepted #3984 gap and read the leaf's usage_metadata from the drained off-state sink, NOT from leaf-level events. See docs/trace-structure-spec.md and docs/design/components/agentic-harness/projects/AH-PRD-05-trace-contract-diff.md for the authoritative spec. MER-E extractors MUST treat all 'deferred' spans as absent in live traces until AH-PRD-05 ships. Conformance test: app/adk/tracking/tests/test_supervisor_orchestration_fixture.py.

children.name: task_delegation
children.deferred_reason: AH-PRD-05 not yet shipped; target shape only — runtime emission gated on AH-PRD-13 + AH-PRD-05. This task_delegation represents a sequential (non-fan-out) coordinator delegation to a task-mode specialist. node_path pattern sourced from AH-99 probe-1 evidence (docs/spike-adk2-supervisor-orchestration-live.md §4); UUID replaced with synthetic value.

summary.query: Analyze website traffic trends for the last 30 days and identify the top 3 acquisition channels.
summary.criteria: Report must include trend direction, percentage change, and channel attribution.

children.name: google_analytics_specialist
children.deferred_reason: AH-PRD-05 not yet shipped; mode='task' specialist run is the target shape only.

children.name: fanout
children.deferred_reason: AH-PRD-05 not yet shipped; target shape only — runtime emission gated on AH-PRD-13 + AH-PRD-05. This fanout span represents a ctx.run_node + asyncio.gather parallel execution group with two branches. task_ids matches the child task_delegation span task_ids. node_path values sourced from AH-99 probe-4 evidence (docs/spike-adk2-supervisor-orchestration-live.md §4).

children.name: task_delegation
children.deferred_reason: AH-PRD-05 not yet shipped; target shape only — fan-out branch A. node_path sourced from AH-99 probe-4 specialist_a evidence.

summary.criteria: Must cover top 20 branded and non-branded keywords with position trend.

children.name: task_delegation
children.deferred_reason: AH-PRD-05 not yet shipped; target shape only — this task_delegation is the synthesis step that depends_on both fan-out result keys (task_002_performance_data_result + task_003_competitor_data_result). Its query template references upstream result keys, demonstrating the fan-in synthesis pattern.

summary.query: Synthesise the traffic analysis from task_002_performance_data_result and task_003_competitor_data_result into a concise executive summary with 3 actionable recommendations.
summary.criteria: Must reference specific metrics from both upstream results and prioritise recommendations by expected impact.
